description: Composition Powder blue blazer made of 100% cotton, has 100% acetate lining, long sleeves with decorative four button cuffs, shoulder pads, a notched lapel, single breasted two button front, pocket on the left chest, two flap pockets on either side of the waist, two buttonable welt pockets in the inner lining, and a vent at the centre back hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This blazer from Reid and Taylor is the perfect piece when you need a versatile top layer to polish up casual outfits or give a friendly air to your formals. It's a unique mix of a formal blazer with contemporary styling – crossing that tricky line between smart and relaxed. Pair it with jeans and suede shoes, or wear unbuttoned with a monochrome shirt, chinos and ankle boots for a subtle touch of class. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
